findings.description: The schematic map image is improperly rendered and heavily cropped.
findings.evidence: The PDF displays a complete, single-page schematic map of the river basins. The HTML version only displays a disjointed right-hand slice of the map, losing significant visual information.

findings.description: Flowchart diagram is missing and rendered as plain text.
findings.evidence: The PDF contains a complex graphical flowchart with shapes, arrows, and layout conveying structure. The HTML strips all graphical elements and renders only the text labels sequentially as an unstructured, run-on paragraph, completely destroying the meaning.

findings.description: The 7 flowchart diagrams from pages 10-16 of the PDF are missing as visual images in the HTML. The HTML only contains a raw text extraction of the labels inside the diagram shapes, which completely loses the relational connections (flow arcs) and structural meaning of the diagrams.
findings.evidence:
PDF pages 10-16 contain visual flowcharts (e.g., 'Flow Chart of Major Nodes in the Upper Cape Fear Basin'). In the HTML, under the corresponding

headings, there are no images. Instead, there is only a disjointed list of text such as '

Reidsville Dam Old Stony Ck Reservoir Reservoirs in the Upper Basin are generally set up with a water supply pool...

'.
